name: driver-fleet-box
description: Refined multi-vendor driver and fleet management app with vehicles, drivers, trips, expenses, maintenance, approvals, reports, and MongoDB Atlas storage.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check server.js && node --check mongo-store.js && node --check file-store.js && node --check state-migration.js && node --check scripts/migrate-leasing-crm.js && node --check scripts/migrate-sqlite-to-mongodb.js
